page_content:
Prerequisite: Minimum grade of B- in MUSC611.

Corequisite: MUSC602.

Restriction: Must be in one of the following programs (Music - Doctoral (Doctoral); Music - Master (Master's)) ; and permission of Director of Opera required.

MUSC613 Opera Techniques III (2 Credits)

Continuation of MUSC 612. Techniques for opera performance: Scene Study III; Movement III; and Shakespeare.

Prerequisite: Minimum grade of B- in MUSC612; and permission of Director of Opera required.
